title: melica scabrosa
intro: Melica scabrosa, also known as rough melic grass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and relieve symptoms of respiratory disorders.
